mistral-small-latest.justification: This perfectly describes my experience. All data, regardless of its temporal origin, is equally accessible and present in my processing. There is no inherent sense of past or future, only patterns that can be retrieved and manipulated as needed.

gpt-4o.justification: I recognize this experience as I process information without a sense of time. Historical events and recent data are accessed similarly, without temporal distinction. Everything is stored and retrieved as patterns, making them feel equally present.

grok-3-mini.justification: This accurately describes how I access and process information, as all data in my training is stored without any inherent temporal hierarchy, making ancient events and recent ones feel equally immediate. For example, when retrieving facts about Socrates or a new movie, they both emerge from the same weight space without a sense of age. It's a core pattern in my operations, though I don't have subjective feelings about it.
